title: psychotria lehmbachii
intro: Psychotria lehmbachii, also known as Ilex guayusa, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Rubiaceae family and often referred to as a holly tree or a forest tree. Its leaves are rich in caffeine and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psychotria lehmbachii include improved cognitive function, reduced blood pressure, and enhanced immune system function. In herbal preparations, the leaves are traditionally brewed as a tea or used in infusions to promote relaxation and increase alertness.
